This is an anomalous node that caused extreme misdirection for traditional commercial big data systems: the official classification tagged it as a 'Medium-sized Enterprise' and placed it into the 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' broad category. Its business license reads like the table of contents for a sci-fi novel, claiming to 'R&D and manufacture optoelectronic products, optical products,' and even 'manufacture integrated circuit chips.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its fatal flaw: the insured headcount is an absolute 0! The spatial probe simultaneously sent back a lethal positioning: '9th Floor, Building 9, TusPark Huaqing... Jiangning District.' TusPark Huaqing is a typical Tsinghua-affiliated tech park/software park where buildings are mostly high-rise offices; '9th Floor, Building 9' means it is suspended mid-air. The logical deduction instantly turns into an absurd comedy: high up on the 9th floor of a tech park, a '0-person' shell that hasn't even hired a receptionist, holding 1.5 million RMB in paid-in capital, claims to be a 'Medium-sized manufacturing enterprise' that will not only build precision optical instruments but also construct a chip (integrated circuit) production line? The probe mercilessly deleted all halos of 'R&D' and 'chip manufacturing,' finding the only reasonable action at the very end of its license: 'business information consulting; corporate management consulting; market research.' The truth comes to light: this is absolutely not a medium-sized hardcore tech factory, but a pure 0-Employee Virtual Shell & Consulting Broker operating from a high altitude. All its grandiose manufacturing declarations were purely padding to decorate its facade or facilitate invoicing, and it has now been subjected to the deepest demotion strike by the system.
